use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF NASAL POLYPS IN PATIENTS >=18 YEARS OF AGE WHO HAVE HAD ETHMOID SINUS SURGERY USING A CORTICOSTEROID-ELUTING (MOMETASONE FUROATE) IMPLANT
